## Topic

Curate articles about space exploration and astronomy — missions, spacecraft, telescopes, and astrophysics discoveries. Exclude unrelated business, finance, or software-tooling news.
<input>{"candidates":[{"id":"01JGFJJZ00G0WKQSJGMAKCNT8S","feedName":"Tech & Science Daily","title":"NASA's Artemis II crew completes lunar flyby rehearsal","description":"The four astronauts ran a full simulation of the crewed Moon flyby, practicing re-entry and recovery procedures ahead of next year’s launch.","published":"2026-05-01T00:00:00Z","link":"https://example.com/artemis-ii"},{"id":"01JGFJJZ00G0WKQSJGMAKCNT8T","feedName":"Tech & Science Daily","title":"James Webb telescope confirms the most distant galaxy yet seen","description":"Astronomers used JWST spectroscopy to confirm a galaxy as it appeared 290 million years after the Big Bang, a new record for cosmic distance.","published":"2026-05-01T00:00:00Z","link":"https://example.com/jwst-galaxy"},{"id":"01JGFJJZ00G0WKQSJGMAKCNT8V","feedName":"Tech & Science Daily","title":"Retail chain beats quarterly earnings estimates","description":"Shares rose 6% after the company reported stronger-than-expected holiday sales and raised its full-year profit guidance.","published":"2026-05-01T00:00:00Z","link":"https://example.com/retail-earnings"},{"id":"01JGFJJZ00G0WKQSJGMAKCNT8W","feedName":"Tech & Science Daily","title":"New JavaScript build tool promises 10x faster bundling","description":"The Rust-based bundler aims to replace existing toolchains for large web applications with incremental compilation.","published":"2026-05-01T00:00:00Z","link":"https://example.com/js-bundler"}]}</input>

posts.snippet: NASA's Artemis II astronauts completed a full rehearsal of their crewed lunar flyby, practicing re-entry and recovery ahead of next year's launch — a key milestone for human deep-space exploration.
Using JWST spectroscopy, astronomers confirmed the most distant galaxy yet observed, seen just 290 million years after the Big Bang — a record-setting astrophysics discovery about the early universe.

response.delta:
curated the magazine, selecting the two articles that clearly match the space exploration and astronomy topic:

1. **NASA's Artemis II

crew lunar flyby rehearsal** — a crewed Moon mission milestone.
2. **James Webb telescope confirms most distant galaxy** — an astrophysics

/telescope discovery.

I excluded the retail earnings article (business/finance) and the JavaScript build tool article (software t
ooling), both unrelated to the topic. No duplicates were present.

posts.snippet: NASA's Artemis II crew rehearsed their crewed Moon flyby, practicing re-entry and recovery ahead of next year's launch — a key milestone in returning humans to lunar space.
Using JWST spectroscopy, astronomers confirmed the most distant galaxy yet observed, seen just 290 million years after the Big Bang, setting a new cosmic distance record.

ning humans to lunar space.
2. **James Webb telescope confirms the most distant galaxy yet seen** — an astrophysics discovery using a telescope.

ail earnings article (business/finance) and the JavaScript build tool article (software tooling), as both fall outside the topic. No duplicates were present.
